parsed.summary: The commit renames the npm scope (@anthropic → @anthropics) and adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured. Changes span plugin metadata, a markdown command file, changelog, package.json, and release card documentation. No executable logic, auth boundaries, data mutations, or runtime code paths are touched — the affected files are configuration, documentation, and a markdown prompt template. No material safety, correctness, or security risk is present in this changeset.
